rules.淘宝: Platform: Taobao. Main images 1:1 800x800+ min. Top center 200×100px area kept empty for price/sale overlay. Detail images prefer 3:4 aspect ratio. Multi-angle and detail shots encouraged.
rules.天猫: Platform: Tmall. Premium positioning. Main images 1:1 800x800+ min, pure white #FFFFFF background preferred. Top center 200×100px area kept empty. Detail images 3:4 ratio. Logo area top-left reserved.
rules.京东: Platform: JD.com. Clean white #FFFFFF background required for main images. Main images 1:1 800x800+ min. No text/watermarks on main images. Detail images 3:4 ratio, informative infographics encouraged.
rules.拼多多: Platform: Pinduoduo. Aggressive value positioning. Main images 1:1 800x800+. Price overlay space top center. Bright, high-contrast visuals. Text-heavy detail images common.
rules.抖音电商: Platform: Douyin Shop. Short-video-first platform. Images 3:4 or 9:16 vertical preferred. Lifestyle, authentic, UGC-style visuals perform best. Avoid overly polished studio look — natural lighting preferred.
rules.小红书: Platform: Xiaohongshu/RED. Lifestyle-community-commerce hybrid. Images 3:4 vertical preferred. Aesthetic, photogenic, editorial feel. Warm tones. UGC-authentic style. Chinese text 「」wrapped in clean layouts.
rules.快手: Platform: Kuaishou. Short-video driven. Images 3:4 or 1:1. Authentic, relatable, real-life style. Bright, high-contrast. Direct value messaging.
rules.Amazon: Platform: Amazon. CRITICAL: main images MUST have pure white #FFFFFF background (RGB 255,255,255). No text, logos, watermarks, or inset images on main image. Product must fill 85%+ of frame. 2000x2000px min recommended. Detail images allow text/infographics.
rules.eBay: Platform: eBay. Clean background preferred. Main images 1600x1600px min. No watermarks or borders. Product should fill most of frame.
rules.Shopify: Platform: Shopify standalone store. Flexible, brand-driven. 2048x2048px recommended. Lifestyle and editorial styles encouraged. Consistent brand aesthetic across all images.
rules.Shopee: Platform: Shopee. Main images 1:1 800x800+ min. Clean background preferred. Top center overlay space for promotions. 3:4 detail images. Multi-language text support (local languages).
rules.Lazada: Platform: Lazada. Main images 1:1 800x800+ min. White background preferred. Product 70-80% of frame. 3:4 detail images. Local-language text support.
rules.Walmart: Platform: Walmart Marketplace. Main images 2000x2000px min. White #FFFFFF background. Product fills 85%+. No text or logos on main image.
rules.Etsy: Platform: Etsy. Handmade/vintage/creative marketplace. Warm, authentic, handmade aesthetic. Lifestyle and detail shots. 5:4 or 4:3 ratio common. Natural lighting, editorial style.
rules.Temu: Platform: Temu. Ultra-value positioning. Bright, bold, high-contrast visuals. Price-focused. 1:1 main images. Aggressive promotional style.
rules.SHEIN: Platform: SHEIN. Fast-fashion ecommerce. 1:1 main images. Model/lifestyle-focused. Young, trendy, editorial fashion aesthetic. 3:4 detail images acceptable.
